steps.title: Interpret the equation components
steps.content: Since $t$ represents years after 1990, the input $t = 30$ corresponds to the year $1990 + 30 = 2020$. The output $P(30) = 550$ indicates the population value is 550.

steps.title: Match to the correct interpretation
steps.content: The equation $P(30) = 550$ predicts that the snow leopard population is 550 in the year 2020. That confirms C is correct.
